title: IDE Integration API — SARIF Export & VS Code Extension Wiring
description: ide_router.py provides real-time code analysis via AST parsing and pattern matching with SARIF format support, security vulnerability detection, and code quality metrics. test_ide_router_unit.py validates the FastAPI endpoints. Gap: the IDE router is a standalone FastAPI app that is not mountable as a VS Code Language Server Protocol (LSP) extension, limiting its reach to HTTP-polling integrations only.
missing: LSP server wrapper: implement a Language Server Protocol server using pygls that wraps the IDE router analysis and serves diagnostics via LSP protocol
VS Code extension manifest: create .vsix extension scaffold that connects to the LSP server and shows ALDECI findings as VS Code inline diagnostics
SARIF upload endpoint: /api/v1/ide/sarif/upload that accepts a SARIF 2.1 file from any scanner and normalizes findings into vuln_lifecycle.db
